member.name: T:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Authentication — register, login, token refresh, password management

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.AuthController.Register(EcommerceCA.Application.DTOs.Auth.RegisterRequestDto)
member.summary: Register a new user account

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.AuthController.Login(EcommerceCA.Application.DTOs.Auth.LoginRequestDto)
member.summary: Login with email and password

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.AuthController.RefreshToken(EcommerceCA.Application.DTOs.Auth.RefreshTokenRequestDto)
member.summary: Get a new access token using a refresh token

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.AuthController.ForgotPassword(EcommerceCA.Application.DTOs.Auth.ForgotPasswordRequestDto)
member.summary: Send a password reset link to the given email

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.AuthController.ResetPassword(EcommerceCA.Application.DTOs.Auth.ResetPasswordRequestDto)
member.summary: Reset password using the token received by email

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.AuthController.ChangePassword(EcommerceCA.Application.DTOs.Auth.ChangePasswordRequestDto)
member.summary: Change password for the currently logged-in user

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.AuthController.Logout(EcommerceCA.Application.DTOs.Auth.RefreshTokenRequestDto)
member.summary: Logout and revoke the refresh token

member.name: T:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.CartController
member.summary: Shopping cart — add, update, remove items and view cart

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.CartController.GetCart
member.summary: Get the current user's cart

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.CartController.AddItem(EcommerceCA.Application.DTOs.Cart.AddToCartDto)
member.summary: Add a product (or variant) to the cart

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.CartController.UpdateItem(System.Int32,EcommerceCA.Application.DTOs.Cart.UpdateCartItemDto)
member.summary: Update the quantity of a cart item

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.CartController.RemoveItem(System.Int32)
member.summary: Remove a specific item from the cart

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.CartController.ClearCart
member.summary: Clear all items from the cart

member.name: T:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.CategoryController
member.summary: Category management — CRUD + image upload

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.CategoryController.GetAll
member.summary: Get all active categories

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.CategoryController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a single category by ID

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.CategoryController.Create(EcommerceCA.Application.DTOs.Category.CreateCategoryDto)
member.summary: Create a new category with optional image upload — Admin only

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.CategoryController.Update(System.Int32,EcommerceCA.Application.DTOs.Category.UpdateCategoryDto)
member.summary: Update an existing category — Admin only

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.CategoryController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a category — Admin only (cannot delete if it has active products)

member.name: T:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.OrderController
member.summary: Order management — place orders, view history, admin status updates

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.OrderController.PlaceOrder(EcommerceCA.Application.DTOs.Order.PlaceOrderDto)
member.summary: Place a new order from the current user's cart

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.OrderController.GetMyOrders(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get the current user's order history (paginated)

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.OrderController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get details of a specific order (must belong to the current user)

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.OrderController.GetAllOrders(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Get all orders — Admin only. Filter by status: Pending | Confirmed | Shipped …

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.OrderController.UpdateStatus(System.Int32,EcommerceCA.Application.DTOs.Order.UpdateOrderStatusDto)
member.summary: Update order status — Admin only

member.name: T:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.PaymentController
member.summary: Payment processing — Stripe and Razorpay flows

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.PaymentController.CreateStripeIntent(System.Int32)
member.summary: Create a Stripe PaymentIntent for the given order. Returns clientSecret to be used by the frontend Stripe.js SDK.

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.PaymentController.ConfirmStripePayment(EcommerceCA.Application.DTOs.Payment.ConfirmPaymentDto)
member.summary: Confirm Stripe payment after the frontend completes the payment. Marks order as Confirmed.

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.PaymentController.CreateRazorpayOrder(System.Int32)
member.summary: Create a Razorpay order for the given application order. Returns the Razorpay order object to be used by the frontend Razorpay SDK.

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.PaymentController.ConfirmRazorpayPayment(EcommerceCA.Application.DTOs.Payment.ConfirmPaymentDto)
member.summary: Confirm Razorpay payment after the frontend completes checkout. Marks order as Confirmed.

member.name: T:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.ProductController
member.summary: Product management — CRUD, pagination, filtering, sorting, variants

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.ProductController.GetAll(EcommerceCA.Application.DTOs.Product.ProductQueryParams)
member.summary: Get all products with pagination, filtering, and sorting. Supports: search, categoryId, minPrice, maxPrice, isCustomizable, inStock, sortBy (price|name|createdAt), sortOrder (asc|desc)

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.ProductController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a single product with its variants

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.ProductController.Create(EcommerceCA.Application.DTOs.Product.CreateProductDto)
member.summary: Create a new product with optional image and variants — Admin only

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.ProductController.Update(System.Int32,EcommerceCA.Application.DTOs.Product.UpdateProductDto)
member.summary: Update an existing product — Admin only

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.ProductController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Soft-delete a product (sets IsActive = false) — Admin only

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.ProductController.AddVariant(System.Int32,EcommerceCA.Application.DTOs.Product.CreateProductVariantDto)
member.summary: Add a size/color variant to a product — Admin only

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.ProductController.DeleteVariant(System.Int32)
member.summary: Soft-delete a product variant — Admin only

member.name: T:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.UserController
member.summary: User profile, addresses, and admin user management

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.UserController.GetProfile
member.summary: Get the current user's profile

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.UserController.UpdateProfile(EcommerceCA.Application.DTOs.User.UpdateProfileDto)
member.summary: Update the current user's profile (name, phone, avatar)

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.UserController.GetAddresses
member.summary: Get all saved addresses for the current user

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.UserController.AddAddress(EcommerceCA.Application.DTOs.User.CreateAddressDto)
member.summary: Add a new shipping address

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.UserController.DeleteAddress(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a saved address

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.UserController.GetAllUsers
member.summary: Get all registered users — Admin only

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.UserController.AssignRole(EcommerceCA.Application.DTOs.User.AssignRoleDto)
member.summary: Assign a role (Admin | User) to a user — Admin only

member.name: M:EcommerceCA.API.Controllers.UserController.ToggleStatus(System.String)
member.summary: Activate or deactivate a user account — Admin only
